description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant orange and dark brown color scheme, featuring bold yellow and white text on the front. The can displays a large, circular label with radiating lines and a prominent central text block, surrounded by smaller informational text and icons. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab opening mechanism. Nutritional information, recycling symbols, and additional product details are printed on the sides in smaller fonts. The can's surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible condensation. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or convenience stores.
description: A bright orange and brown aluminum can with bold yellow and white text, featuring a smooth, glossy surface and a standard pull tab top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with large yellow and white text, circular design elements, and a prominent pull tab on top.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the orange background, vertical text, and recycling information, with the main label partially visible.
description_view_2: This angle shows the nutritional information panel and barcode, with the main label still partially visible and the pull tab on top.
description_view_3: The back view displays a large white panel, more nutritional details, and less of the main label, focusing on product information.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, circular design with radiating lines, large yellow and white text, and a modern, high-contrast color palette of orange, brown, and yellow. The typography is strong and clear, with additional product details and icons arranged around the main label.
